hero.title: Realize Your Best Potential with
hero.subtitle: Create Your Force, Shape The Future!

about.title: Building the Future Through Human Development
about.description1: APR Foundation is a multi-stakeholder collaborative ecosystem for HR & Organization development, with direct experience handling government, corporate, and grassroots community programs in Indonesia. We are here to help create a better future
about.taglineHighlight: Create Your Force, Shape The Future!
about.description2: With the spirit of discovering the potential within, APR is committed to developing the quality of human resources, fostering entrepreneurship, and providing the best creative services to shape a better future for Indonesia.
about.overlayDescription: Building Indonesia's Superior Human Resources that connects government, corporations, and communities to create sustainable impact.

stats.title: Measurable Impact in Numbers
stats.subtitle: We are proud of this journey and achievements, reflecting our commitment to Human Resources and Organization development.

organisasi.description: Have become our partners in achieving development goals

focusAreas.title: APR Focus Areas: Key Fields of Change
focusAreas.subtitle: APR has a strong commitment to creating positive change in various sectors crucial for Indonesia's future.

visionMission.title: Vision & Mission
visionMission.subtitle: The fundamental values that direct our actions, cohorts, partnerships, and scientific audits.

vision.title: To Become a Collaborative Ecosystem
vision.description: in developing quality, creative Human Resources & Organizations that have a positive impact on Indonesian society.

mission.title: Our Mission
items: Facilitate sustainable individual and organizational development.

manifesto.title: Journey and Manifesto
manifesto.subtitle: Our Journey and Manifesto
manifesto.quote: APR was founded on the belief that every individual and organization has unlimited potential waiting to be unlocked.

journey.title: Our Journey
journey.content: Starting from various initiatives, from small communities, APR has grown and evolved into a professional entity that has handled various HR development programs and creative projects across Indonesia.

spirit.title: Our Spirit
spirit.content: We were born from the spirit of mutual cooperation to advance the quality of Indonesian humans through collaboration and continuous innovation.

legal.title: Legal Foundation
legal.content: APR Foundation was established based on Foundation Establishment Deed No. 01 dated April 20, 2026, made before Notary Nailul Husna, S.H., M.Kn.; and Decree of the Minister of Law of the Republic of Indonesia Number AHU-0010217.AH.01.04. Year 2026 dated April 23, 2026 concerning Ratification of Legal Entity of Aprakarsa Cipta Strategika Nusantara Foundation.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose APR?
whyChoose.subtitle: With a collaborative approach and creative work processes, we help individuals and organizations achieve their best potential. We are committed to providing real added value

expert-led.title: Focus on Quality
expert-led.description: Every program is designed and implemented with the highest national standards, ensuring optimal and impactful results.

awareness.title: Care for Development
awareness.description: We understand that every individual and organization has unique potential. Our priority is to help you identify and develop it

innovation.title: Sustainable Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously present fresh, relevant, and effective learning methods, adapting to the dynamics of market needs and technology.

impact-measured.title: Measurable Results
impact-measured.description: We are committed to providing real, measurable impact, supporting individual growth and the sustainability of your organization.
